Name: Mushroom Skewer
Caption:
This simple mushroom-packed skewer has its
colorful presentation to thank for its appeal.
Caption (Japanese):
キノコの風味が香るシンプルな串焼き
カラフルな見た目が食欲をそそる

Name: Meat and Mushroom Skewer
Caption:
A filling dish made by grilling various
mountain ingredients with meat.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な肉をメインに 山の恵みをふんだんに使った
ボリューム満点の串焼き料理

Name: Fish and Mushroom Skewer
Caption:
A simple dish made by cooking skewered
fresh fish alongside fragrant mushrooms.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な魚の串焼きに香りの高いキノコを添えた
シンプルながら味わい深い料理

Name: Meat Skewer
Caption:
A juicy, filling snack made by grilling small
chunks of meat on a skewer.
Caption (Japanese):
大自然の恵み ケモノ肉を
豪快に焼き上げたジューシーな串焼き

Name: Fish Skewer
Caption:
A simple dish made by cooking chunks of
fresh fish on a skewer.
Caption (Japanese):
採れたての魚を串に刺して焼き上げた
シンプルながらもっとも魚の味を楽しめる料理

Name: Seafood Skewer
Caption:
A skewer of delicious roasted fish
and shellfish.
Caption (Japanese):
魚や貝などの素材を組み合わせた串焼き
魚介の旨味が堪能できる料理

Name: Copious Meat Skewers
Caption:
Just shove a bunch of meat onto a skewer,
and you're good to go.
Caption (Japanese):
異なる種類の肉を使った 贅沢な串焼き
焼き肉好きならば 一度は食べてみたい料理

Name: Copious Seafood Skewers
Caption:
It's just a whole heap of stuff shoved onto a
skewer, but it's still a pretty tasty dish.
Caption (Japanese):
色々な種類の魚を ふんだんに使った串焼き
焼魚好きには たまらない逸品

Name: Steamed Fruit
Caption:
A regional dish made by steaming near-
ripened fruits in the leaves of fragrant plants.
Caption (Japanese):
完全に熟す前のフルーツを
香りの高い山菜で包んで蒸し焼きにした郷土料理

Name: Steamed Tomatoes
Caption:
Tomato cooked while wrapped in a leaf. The
heat brings out its medicinal effect.
Caption (Japanese):
薬効のある植物の葉で トマトを包んで焼いた料理
火を通しているため 消化吸収の効率が高い

Name: Steamed Mushrooms
Caption:
A healthy vegetable dish achieved by
steaming mushrooms in plant leaves.
Caption (Japanese):
香りの良い山菜でキノコを包んで焼き上げた
ヘルシーな野菜料理

Name: Steamed Meat
Caption:
This meat dish has been wrapped in fragrant
leaves and steamed to preserve its moisture.
Caption (Japanese):
肉のうまみを逃がさないよう
香りの良い山菜で包んで焼き上げた蒸し焼き

Name: Steamed Fish
Caption:
A refined dish made by wrapping a fresh fish
in fragrant wild greens and cooking it.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な魚を香りの強い野草で包み
じっくり焼き上げた手の込んだ料理

Name: Sautéed Peppers
Caption:
The spiciness of these sautéed peppers has
been broken by the heat for a sweeter taste.
Caption (Japanese):
ポカポカ草の実だけで作った珍しい炒め物
辛さの中に かすかなうまみを感じる

Name: Sautéed Nuts
Caption:
These sautéed tree seeds are the perfect
snack for the busy adventurer on the go!
Caption (Japanese):
森の木の実を香ばしく炒めた かんたん料理
栄養満点で小腹が空いた時にぴったりのおやつ

Name: Fried Wild Greens
Caption:
A basic vegetable dish made by sautéing
fresh wild plants.
Caption (Japanese):
一番簡単な野菜料理
フレッシュな野草を さっと炒めた一品

Name: Copious Fried Wild Greens
Caption:
A healthy dish made by cooking mixed 
greens over a strong flame.
Caption (Japanese):
体に良い山菜をたくさん使い
強火で焼き上げた体にとても良い料理

Name: Cooked Stambulb
Caption:
A wild dish of a whole stambulb roasted
with its skin on. Sweet and tasty.
Caption (Japanese):
皮に包まれたままのガンバリ草を 丸ごと焼いた
ワイルドな料理 甘くホクホクしておいしい

Name: Buttered Stambulb
Caption:
A simple dish of stambulb sautéed with
goat butter. Sweet with a hint of spice.
Caption (Japanese):
ガンバリ草をヤギのバターで炒めたシンプル料理
塩味と甘味がほど良く 香ばしい風味がたまらない

Name: Copious Mushroom Skewers
Caption:
Fans of fungal cuisine can't resist this simple
mushroom-skewer dish. Very filling.
Caption (Japanese):
キノコ好きが最後に行き着くという
シンプルな串焼きキノコ 結構お腹がふくれる

Name: Spiced Meat Skewer
Caption:
A special Goron spice covers up the scent
of the meat, allowing its flavor to shine.
Caption (Japanese):
ゴロン族特製のスパイスが 肉の臭み消しになり
素材の旨味が引き立ったステーキ

Name: Prime Spiced Meat Skewer
Caption:
The simple preparation of this steak dish
belies its complex taste profile.
Caption (Japanese):
上質な肉に特製スパイスを効かせたステーキ
シンプルながら奥の深い味を楽しめる

Name: Gourmet Spiced Meat Skewer
Caption:
The rich aroma and juicy texture of this high-
quality meat puts it in a league of its own.
Caption (Japanese):
最高の肉を香辛粉のみで味付けしたステーキ
豊かな香りと濃厚な肉汁は 格別な味わい

Name: Crab Stir-Fry
Caption:
The Goron spice used in preparing this crab
pairs perfectly with the flavor of its meat.
Caption (Japanese):
ゴロンの香辛粉を効かせたカニの炒め物
スパイシーな味付けは カニの身と相性抜群

Name: Meat and Seafood Fry
Caption:
A filling dish made by cooking fresh seafood
and meat together.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な肉や魚をこんがりと焼き上げた
ボリューム満点の料理

Name: Prime Meat and Seafood Fry
Caption:
This comfort dish is made with choice cuts
of meat and seafood.
Caption (Japanese):
上質な肉と魚を組み合わせた焼きもの
ただの山海焼きより 上品で深い味わい

Name: Gourmet Meat and Seafood Fry
Caption:
A marriage of the choicest cuts of meat and
seafood. As delicious as it is filling!
Caption (Japanese):
最上級の肉と新鮮な魚を 一緒に焼き上げた料理
味も食べごたえも まさに極上なひと品

Name: Salt-Grilled Greens
Caption:
A health-boosting dish made with leafy
greens and a touch of salt.
Caption (Japanese):
植物や野菜だけで作った
とっても体によい料理

Name: Salt-Grilled Mushrooms
Caption:
A basic mushroom dish made by lightly
salting mushrooms and grilling them.
Caption (Japanese):
キノコに軽く岩塩をまぶして焼いた
もっともシンプルな料理

Name: Salt-Grilled Meat
Caption:
Short on ingredients? Just rub some meat in
salt and cook it for a simple, tasty dish.
Caption (Japanese):
分厚い肉に天然の岩塩をまぶして焼き上げた
シンプルだからこそ際立つ素材のおいしさ

Name: Salt-Grilled Prime Meat
Caption:
A simple yet exquisite dish made by grilling
high-quality meat on top of rock salt.
Caption (Japanese):
上質な肉を岩塩の上で焼き上げた
シンプルながら贅沢な焼き肉

Name: Salt-Grilled Gourmet Meat
Caption:
This lavish grilled dish makes liberal use of
high-quality cuts of meat.
Caption (Japanese):
貴重な極上肉を使った 最高級焼き肉
素材の味を活かすために 岩塩だけで味付している

Name: Salt-Grilled Fish
Caption:
A simple dish made by rolling a whole fish in
natural rock salt before grilling it.
Caption (Japanese):
天然の岩塩をまぶして焼き上げた
シンプルな魚料理 ただ焼いただけで十分おいしい

Name: Salt-Grilled Crab
Caption:
Nine out of ten fishermen agree crab is best
enjoyed grilled and with just a bit of salt.
Caption (Japanese):
カニを食べ慣れた漁師が一番おいしいと言うのが
このシンプルな食べ方 ホクホクの身がたまらない

Name: Herb Sauté
Caption:
A fragrant mixture of herbs and spices.
It's easily recognized by its unique aroma.
Caption (Japanese):
香りの強い素材を スパイスと一緒に炒めて作った
野菜炒め 独特の香りがクセになる一品

Name: Fragrant Mushroom Sauté
Caption:
The fragrant aroma of this sautéed spice and
mushroom dish makes your mouth water.
Caption (Japanese):
キノコをスパイスで炒めたひと皿
刺激的な香りが食欲をそそる

Name: Pepper Steak
Caption:
The meat has been cooked in crushed
peppers to accent its natural taste.
Caption (Japanese):
ポカポカ草の実をすり込んで焼く事で
肉の臭みを消してうま味を引き出した肉料理

Name: Pepper Seafood
Caption:
The pepper seeds grilled with this seafood
draw out its taste and pleasant aroma.
Caption (Japanese):
ポカポカ草の実を使って魚の臭みを消しつつ
香ばしさを際立たせた焼き料理

Name: Fragrant Seafood Stew
Caption:
A tasty dish of seafood and stambulb cooked
in oil. Its aroma will whet your appetite.
Caption (Japanese):
海鮮食材をガンバリ草たっぷりのオイルで
煮込んだ料理 強い香りが食欲をかき立てる

Name: Deep-Fried Drumstick
Caption:
A drumstick fried in high-quality oil. It's full of
out-of-this-world flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
トリ肉を良質なオイルで揚げた料理
中には肉の旨味が閉じ込められている

Name: Deep-Fried Thigh
Caption:
A deep-fried bird thigh so good, it's hard to
take bites that aren't too big!
Caption (Japanese):
質の良いトリ肉を揚げ物にした料理
お腹が空いたら 豪快にかぶりついて食べたい

Name: Deep-Fried Bird Roast
Caption:
A deep-fried whole bird of the highest grade.
It's a standard item in any celebratory feast.
Name (Japanese): 極上トリ肉オイル揚げ
Caption (Japanese):
最高級のトリ肉を丸ごと揚げた
お祝いの席では定番の贅沢料理

Name: Seafood Meunière
Caption:
Rich butter flanks fresh seafood. The secret
ingredient is lots and lots of love.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な魚をバターで両面焼き上げた料理
外側をカリッとさせるのが おいしく作るコツ

Name: Porgy Meunière
Caption:
Popular among residents of coastal regions,
this juicy porgy is a delish dish.
Caption (Japanese):
海沿いの地域で好んで食べられる魚料理
新鮮なタイのフワフワした身が美味

Name: Salmon Meunière
Caption:
The crispy skin of this fried hearty salmon
puts its texture in a class all its own.
Caption (Japanese):
マックスサーモンに小麦粉をまぶし バターで
焼いた料理  皮のパリパリした食感も格別

Name: Fruit and Mushroom Mix
Caption:
This dish contrasts the sweetness of fruit with
the savoriness of mushrooms.
Caption (Japanese):
焼く事で果実の甘みが凝縮され
独特の食感まで生まれたアイデア料理

Name: Simmered Fruit
Caption:
This sweet dish is made by heaping tasty
fruits into a pan and simmering until tender.
Caption (Japanese):
そのまま食べてもおいしいフルーツを
山盛り入れて煮込んだ甘酸っぱい料理

Name: Copious Simmered Fruit
Caption:
The flavors of the various fruits in this
simmered dish exist in perfect harmony.
Caption (Japanese):
様々な味のフルーツをコトコト煮込んで
甘みが凝縮された贅沢な料理

Name: Simmered Tomato
Caption:
When simmered until tender, nutritious
tomatoes can give this dish a sour kick.
Caption (Japanese):
栄養たっぷりのトマトを
柔らかくなるまで煮込んだ酸味のある料理

Name: Fruity Tomato Stew
Caption:
A colorful dish, a bounty of fruit simmered
with fresh tomatoes.
Caption (Japanese):
みずみずしいトマトを まろやかなミルクで
煮込んだスープ マイルドな酸味で飲みやすい

Name: Tomato Mushroom Stew
Caption:
A dish of fragrant mushrooms simmered with
tomato. Healthy and rich in fiber.
Name (Japanese): キノコのトマト煮込み
Caption (Japanese):
香り高いキノコをトマトで煮込んだ料理
食物繊維たっぷりで とってもヘルシー

Name: Tomato Seafood Soup
Caption:
Seafood simmered with tomato. Full of
intense flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
魚や貝といった水産物を トマトと煮込んで
味付けした料理 様々な旨味が凝縮されている

Name: Cream of Vegetable Soup
Caption:
Made by simmering vegetables in milk, this
healthy dish is as simple as its ingredients.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な野菜をミルクで煮込んだスープ
シンプルな味付で ヘルシーな仕上がり

Name: Veggie Cream Soup
Caption:
This creamy soup showcases the sweetness
of vegetables in a veritable taste explosion.
Caption (Japanese):
野菜の甘みを味わえるクリーミーなスープ
じっくり煮込んであり 味わいのあるひと皿

Name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
Caption:
This creamy mushroom-and-vegetable soup
is thick and flavorful.
Caption (Japanese):
野菜やキノコを使ったミルクスープ
具だくさんで 食べごたえも十分

Name: Creamy Meat Soup
Caption:
This nutritious soup contains serious portions
of lightly braised meat and many vegetables.
Caption (Japanese):
軽く炙った肉を豪快に入れたミルクスープ
野菜もたっぷりで 栄養満点のひと品

Name: Creamy Seafood Soup
Caption:
Thick-cut chunks of seafood and stock
provide a satisfying savoriness.
Caption (Japanese):
ぶつ切りにした魚の身を入れたミルクスープ
ダシが効いて旨味が深くなっている

Name: Snail Chowder
Caption:
The pleasant texture and flavor of snails
combine with butter and milk in a rich soup.
Caption (Japanese):
食感の良い貝の旨味をバターとミルクの
濃厚なスープにしっかりと閉じ込めた逸品

Name: Creamy Heart Soup
Caption:
Enjoying this sweet soup with another person
will bring you both closer together.
Caption (Japanese):
フルーツの甘さたっぷりのスープ  二人で一緒に
食べると仲が良くなるというジンクスがある

Name: Glazed Veggies
Caption:
Don't like the taste of vegetables? Simply
sauté them in honey for a salty-sweet flavor!
Caption (Japanese):
ハチミツを使って野菜を甘辛く煮込んだ料理
生では食べにくい野菜もおいしくいただける

Name: Glazed Mushrooms
Caption:
The honey in this mushroom dish gives it a
sweet, complex taste and a savory finish.
Caption (Japanese):
ハチミツを加えて甘辛く煮込んだキノコ料理
濃厚で奥深い味わい

Name: Glazed Meat
Caption:
The sweetness of the honey permeates the
meat, giving it a complex taste profile.
Caption (Japanese):
ハチミツの甘さが肉にしみこんで
ただ焼くだけでは味わえない深い味わい

Name: Glazed Seafood
Caption:
A seafood dish that you can actually
wolf down whole!
Caption (Japanese):
ハチミツで煮込んだ甘辛い魚料理
柔らかくなった骨まで食べられる

Name: Curry Rice
Caption:
A favorite all over Hyrule, this simple dish has
a flavor you just won't get tired of.
Caption (Japanese):
子供から大人まで みんなが大好きな定番料理
シンプルで飽きのこない味が楽しめるひと皿

Name: Vegetable Curry
Caption:
This healthy curry is popular for its mild flavor
and moderate spiciness.
Caption (Japanese):
野菜をメインにしたヘルシーなカレー
辛さ控えめの優しい味で 人気が高い

Name: Meat Curry
Caption:
The heat from the spice allows you to enjoy
the large portion of the meat's savoriness.
Caption (Japanese):
大きなケモノ肉が入ったワイルドなカレーライス
スパイスの辛さが 肉の旨味を引き立たせている

Name: Prime Meat Curry
Caption:
The high-quality meat in this curry has given
it a deeper taste than most other curries.
Caption (Japanese):
メインに上質なケモノ肉を使う事で
食べごたえと 味の深みが増したカレー

Name: Gourmet Meat Curry
Caption:
The high-quality meat used in this prized
dish satisfies meat and curry lovers alike.
Caption (Japanese):
最上級のケモノ肉を豪勢に盛り付けたカレー
カレー好きも肉好きも大満足の逸品

Name: Poultry Curry
Caption:
The savory meat pairs well with the aroma
of spice in this common curry.
Caption (Japanese):
トリ肉をメインにした スタンダードなカレー
トリ肉の旨味がスパイスの香りに良く合う

Name: Prime Poultry Curry
Caption:
The secret to this curry's flavor is taking it off
the heat while you add the spices.
Caption (Japanese):
上質なトリ肉を使ったカレー いったん火を
止めてから香辛粉を入れるのが 深い味わいの秘密

Name: Gourmet Poultry Curry
Caption:
Once served in Hyrule Castle, the poultry
used in this dish is of immensely high quality.
Caption (Japanese):
最高級のトリ肉が 惜しげなく使われたカレー
かつてのハイラル城でも作られたと言われている

Name: Seafood Curry
Caption:
This dish brims with treasures from the sea.
Its spice packs a kick, so it's not for kids.
Caption (Japanese):
海の幸をたっぷり味わえる 贅沢なカレー
辛口な仕上がりが ちょっぴり大人な味わい

Name: Cheesy Curry
Caption:
Curry with plenty of Hateno cheese, which
balances the spiciness and urges seconds.
Caption (Japanese):
ハテノチーズをたっぷり使ったカレー 香辛料の
辛さをチーズでマイルドにまとめた癖になる一品

Name: Carrot Stew
Caption:
This simple stew sat simmering for a long time
to bring out the sweetness of the carrots.
Caption (Japanese):
ニンジンをたっぷり使ったシチュー
じっくり煮込まれて 独特の甘みが引き立っている

Name: Pumpkin Stew
Caption:
Simply simmer a pumpkin to make
this dish. A favorite in Kakariko Village.
Caption (Japanese):
熟したカボチャを長時間煮込んだシチュー
カカリコ村では夕食としてよく作られる

Name: Meat Stew
Caption:
The hearty meat in this mainstay dish leaves
bellies satisfied all throughout Hyrule.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な肉をメインにした ハイラルの定番シチュー
食べごたえたっぷりで お腹も満足なひと皿

Name: Prime Meat Stew
Caption:
Letting the large portions of choice cuts of
meat simmer brought out their savoriness.
Caption (Japanese):
大き目な上質肉を贅沢に使用したシチュー
煮込まれて肉の旨味がさらに凝縮したひと品

Name: Gourmet Meat Stew
Caption:
The meat has simmered for so long it melts in
your mouth. A true bucket-list meal!
Caption (Japanese):
煮込まれて最高に柔らかくなった極上の肉が
口の中でとろける 一度は食べたい絶品シチュー

Name: Meat-Stuffed Pumpkin
Caption:
This hollow, meat-filled pumpkin is a
local specialty of Kakariko Village.
Caption (Japanese):
カボチャをくり抜いて肉を詰めた料理
カカリコ村の代表的な郷土料理のひとつ

Name: Vegetable Risotto
Caption:
The sweetness of the ingredients
gives this risotto a mild flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
野菜の甘みが堪能できるリゾット
優しい味わいで 子供にも人気なひと皿

Name: Mushroom Risotto
Caption:
The tantalizing aroma of mushrooms and
butter beckons you to the table.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラル米をじっくりと煮立てた料理
キノコとバターの香りが食欲をそそる

Name: Salmon Risotto
Caption:
The rice used in this rich risotto permeates
the light flavor of the salmon.
Caption (Japanese):
マックスサーモンの旨味がハイラル米に
しっかりと染み込んだ 濃厚なリゾット

Name: Crab Risotto
Caption:
An everyday staple of seaside villages, the
secret to its delicious flavor lies in crab fat.
Caption (Japanese):
海沿いの村で 家庭料理として作られるリゾット
カニのミソも味付けに使うのが おいしさの秘密

Name: Cheesy Risotto
Caption:
Rich risotto made with fish or mushroom
mixed with Hylian rice and Hateno cheese.
Caption (Japanese):
魚やキノコなどの具材をハイラル米に混ぜ
ハテノチーズを入れて煮立てた 濃厚なリゾット

Name: Poultry Pilaf
Caption:
Sautéed Hylian rice steamed in poultry
broth. Cook on low heat until the rice is fluffy.
Caption (Japanese):
炒めたハイラル米を トリ肉のダシ汁で炊いた料理
弱火でじっくり火が通され ふっくらした仕上がり

Name: Prime Poultry Pilaf
Caption:
The rice permeates the savory taste of the
poultry in this Gerudo-region favorite.
Caption (Japanese):
ゲルド地方で好んで作られる米料理
上質なトリ肉の旨味が 米によく染みている

Name: Gourmet Poultry Pilaf
Caption:
Made with the highest-quality poultry, every
bite of this pilaf floods your mouth with flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
極上のトリ肉を 贅沢に盛り付けたピラフ
噛むごとに深い味わいが 口の中に広がる逸品

Name: Seafood Paella
Caption:
No fisherman's birthday bash would be
complete without this top-shelf seafood dish.
Caption (Japanese):
贅沢な海鮮食材をたくさん使った特別な料理
漁師たちの祝い事には欠かせないひと品

Name: Curry Pilaf
Caption:
The Goron spice used in this pilaf has given
it a rich, spicy aroma.
Caption (Japanese):
ゴロンの香辛粉の香りが豊かなピラフ
マイルドな辛さで 食べやすく仕上げられている

Name: Fried Egg and Rice
Caption:
The soft egg yolk pairs well with the fresh
rice in this simple dish.
Caption (Japanese):
目玉焼きのとろりとした黄身が 炊き立てのご飯に
とても良く合う シンプルだが奥の深い料理

Name: Crunchy Fried Rice
Caption:
Hylian rice fried up with meat in high-quality
oil. Each bite is packed with toasty flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラル米と肉を質の良い油で炒めた料理
粒が際立っていて 口の中に香ばしい風味が広がる

Name: Seafood Fried Rice
Caption:
Various seafood has been sautéed with rice.
The stronger the flame, the tastier the dish!
Caption (Japanese):
高級な海の食材を 米と一緒に炒めた一品
強火で炒めるとパラッと美味しく仕上がる

Name: Crab Omelet with Rice
Caption:
The fluffy crab legs pair perfectly with the
rice for a truly scrumptious dish.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なカニの身たっぷりの豪華なチャーハン
ふんわりタマゴとの組み合わせが 絶妙な味わい

Name: Meat and Rice Bowl
Caption:
This dish of rice and lightly seared meat is a
mainstay all throughout Hyrule.
Caption (Japanese):
さっとあぶったケモノ肉を
ご飯の上に敷き詰めた定番どんぶり料理

Name: Prime Meat and Rice Bowl
Caption:
This bowl is loaded with high-quality meat.
Your hunt for a serious meal ends here.
Caption (Japanese):
上質なケモノ肉を豪快に盛り付けた どんぶり
ガッツリ食べたい時にぴったり

Name: Gourmet Meat and Rice Bowl
Caption:
Only the most carefully selected cuts of high-
quality meats go into this dish.
Caption (Japanese):
極上のケモノ肉を選りすぐって使った 究極の肉丼
肉の旨味をシンプルかつ大胆に味わえる逸品

Name: Cheesy Meat Bowl
Caption:
A high-calorie dish with meat and plenty of
cheese. A great dish for very hungry diners.
Caption (Japanese):
ケモノ肉とたっぷりのチーズを盛りつけた
高カロリー料理 お腹が空いている時に食べたい品

Name: Prime Cheesy Meat Bowl
Caption:
This bowl is loaded with high-quality meat and
cheese. A satisfying meal for any big eater.
Caption (Japanese):
上質なケモノ肉を敷き詰めてチーズを乗せた 
食いしん坊も大満足のまんぷく料理

Name: Gourmet Cheesy Meat Bowl
Caption:
Top-quality meat and cheese piled high. But
can it satisfy the ultimate gourmand?
Name (Japanese): 極上チーズケモノ肉丼
Caption (Japanese):
最高級のケモノ肉に限界までチーズを盛りつけた
究極の満足料理 人の食欲は留まる事を知らない

Name: Veggie Rice Balls
Caption:
This home-style dish of Kakariko Village is
stuffed with the bounty of the mountains.
Caption (Japanese):
山の恵みの山菜を たっぷり詰め込んだおにぎり
カカリコ村の代表的な家庭料理のひとつ

Name: Mushroom Rice Balls
Caption:
The aroma of the mushrooms tickles your
nose as you peel back the leafy wrapping.
Caption (Japanese):
キノコの混ぜ込みごはんで作ったおにぎり
包みを開くと キノコの香りがふわっと広がる

Name: Meaty Rice Balls
Caption:
The sweet and spicy meat stuffed into these
rice balls will keep you full for some time.
Caption (Japanese):
甘辛く味を付けた肉がたっぷり詰まった おにぎり
ボリューム満点でお腹にしっかり溜まる

Name: Seafood Rice Balls
Caption:
Stuffed with aromatic seafood, the flavor can
vary by ingredients but never disappoints.
Caption (Japanese):
香ばしく焼いた魚を詰めた おにぎり
中に入れる魚によって 違った味が楽しめる

Name: Veggie Porridge
Caption:
Porridge made of easy-to-digest vegetables,
fresh milk, and Hylian rice. An uplifting dish.
Caption (Japanese):
消化の良い野草とハイラル米を煮込んだおかゆ
元気が出ない時も やさしい味で満たしてくれる

Name: Wheat Bread
Caption:
Made with wheat from the Tabantha region,
this soft, springy bread smells just heavenly.
Caption (Japanese):
タバンタ地方で採れる小麦を使ったパン
モチモチした食感と 小麦の豊かな香りが楽しめる

Name: Melty Cheesy Bread
Caption:
Is there anything better than a simple slice of
bread baked with Hateno cheese on top?
Caption (Japanese):
ハテノチーズを乗せて焼いた素朴なパン
温かいチーズの香りが食欲をそそる

Name: Hylian Tomato Pizza
Caption:
A pizza made with fresh Hylian tomato. Slices
of melty Hateno cheese make it irresistible.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なハイラルトマトをトッピングしたピザ
とろけるハテノチーズがたまらない

Name: Meat Pie
Caption:
You'll need an extra napkin to deal with this
juicy pie of perfectly baked minced meat.
Caption (Japanese):
細かくした肉を パイ生地に包んで焼きあげた料理
ジューシーな肉汁がたっぷり詰まっている

Name: Fish Pie
Caption:
A mainstay in any fisherman's home, the
crisp crust pairs well with the fishy flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
パイで魚を包んで焼く 漁師の奥さんの定番料理
魚の旨味とサクサクした食感を楽しめる ひと皿

Name: Cheesy Tomato
Caption:
A simple dish of Hylian tomato topped with
delicious Hateno cheese. A perfect snack.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラルトマトにハテノチーズをのせた
シンプル料理 小腹が空いた時にちょうど良い

Name: Cheesy Baked Fish
Caption:
Fresh seafood delightfully accented with a
generous serving of Hateno cheese.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮な海産物をハテノチーズと一緒に焼いた料理
魚の旨味とチーズの風味が相性抜群

Name: Omelet
Caption:
This simple dish is common all over Hyrule.
Simply fry egg until it's nice and plump.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なたまごをふっくらと焼き上げた
朝食にぴったりな 定番たまご料理

Name: Vegetable Omelet
Caption:
This home-style dish mixes fluffy eggs with
chopped vegetables for nutritional balance.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なタマゴをフワッと焼きあげた家庭料理
刻んだ野菜が混ぜられていて 栄養バランスも満点

Name: Mushroom Omelet
Caption:
The fluffy texture of this omelet is one of the
great joys of this dish, as well as life.
Caption (Japanese):
香りの強いキノコを混ぜ込んだオムレツ
ふわふわの食感が楽しめるひと皿

Name: Cheesy Omelet
Caption:
A satisfying dish with Hateno cheese poured
over a tasty omelet.
Caption (Japanese):
そのままでもおいしいオムレツに ハテノチーズの
ソースをたっぷりかけた大満足な料理

Name: Hot Buttered Apple
Caption:
The apple's sweetness has been enhanced
by smothering it with butter and baking it.
Caption (Japanese):
火を通して甘味が増したリンゴに
アツアツのヤギのバターを絡めた濃厚スイーツ

Name: Honeyed Fruits
Caption:
A dish that combines the thick sweetness of
honey with the acidity of sour fruits.
Caption (Japanese):
ハチミツの濃厚な甘みと
フルーツの酸味が口いっぱいに広がるスイーツ

Name: Honeyed Apple
Caption:
A juicy sweet-and-sour dish combining
newly ripened apples with honey.
Caption (Japanese):
完熟リンゴとハチミツが絡み合う
甘酸っぱくジューシーなスイーツ

Name: Honey Candy
Caption:
A natural sweet, brimming with nutrition and
made by stewing fresh honey.
Caption (Japanese):
巣から集めたハチミツを 煮詰めて固めた
ほんのり甘い 栄養満点の天然キャンディー

Name: Fried Bananas
Caption:
Children love fried mighty bananas. The trick
is frying them over very high heat.
Caption (Japanese):
ツルギバナナを揚げた子供に人気のおやつ
高温でサッと揚げるのがおいしく作るコツ

Name: Egg Pudding
Caption:
Made by cooking eggs and milk in a special
mold, its soft texture melts in your mouth.
Caption (Japanese):
タマゴとミルクを型に入れて焼いたデザート
なめらかで 舌の上でとろける食感が楽しめる

Name: Plain Crepe
Caption:
The simplicity of this dish lets the flavor of its
ingredients shine.
Caption (Japanese):
薄く伸ばした砂糖入りの生地を焼いたデザート
素材の味が活きるシンプルなひと品

Name: Wildberry Crepe
Caption:
Sweet, tart wildberries are folded into thin,
springy dough to make this dessert.
Caption (Japanese):
しっとりモチモチに焼き上げた生地に 
甘酸っぱいイチゴをたっぷり包んだクレープ

Name: Honey Crepe
Caption:
Honey has been drizzled over thin crepes to
bring out their natural sweetness and flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
薄く焼いた生地にハチミツを掛けたデザート
自然な甘さと 豊かな風味が特徴

Name: Nutcake
Caption:
Forest nuts give this cake a pleasant texture
and a simple, understated sweetness.
Caption (Japanese):
森で手に入る木の実を使ったケーキ
素朴な甘さと 木の実の食感が楽しめる

Name: Fruitcake
Caption:
Making ample use of fruits found all over
Hyrule, this cake is a must for celebrations.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラル中の新鮮なフルーツをふんだんに使った
豪華なケーキ お祝い事には欠かせないひと品

Name: Carrot Cake
Caption:
Even those who don't like carrots tend to
enjoy the mild sweetness of this cake.
Caption (Japanese):
優しい甘さが特徴のケーキ
ニンジンが苦手な人でも食べられると言われる

Name: Pumpkin Pie
Caption:
The intense sweetness of pumpkins makes
this dessert popular among children.
Caption (Japanese):
カボチャをたっぷり使った黄金色のケーキ
濃厚な甘さが子供にも大人気

Name: Cheesecake
Caption:
A rich, moist, flavorful dessert with a
Hateno cheese base.
Caption (Japanese):
ハテノチーズを使った 風味豊かなケーキ
しっとりしていて濃厚な味わい

Name: Fruit Pie
Caption:
A celebration isn't a celebration until this
fruit-filled crust hits the table!
Caption (Japanese):
パイ生地に果物をたっぷり乗せたデザート
ハイラルではお祝いの際によく作られる

Name: Apple Pie
Caption:
The crispy, flaky pie crust and sweet apples
are a match made in heaven.
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なリンゴをたっぷり使った定番のデザート
サクサクのパイ生地とリンゴの甘さが 相性抜群

Name: Egg Tart
Caption:
You'll know this simple dessert is done
baking when it smells just delightful.
Caption (Japanese):
濃厚な卵黄のクリームをパイ生地に詰めて
香ばしく焼き上げたデザート

Name: Milk
Caption:
Make this by heating up some milk. Drink it
before bed to ensure a good night's sleep.
Caption (Japanese):
フレッシュミルクをじっくりと温めた飲み物
寝る前に飲むとリラックスできる

Name: Noble Pursuit
Caption:
A popular fruit juice in Gerudo Town. Its
tropical flavor will cheer you right up.
Name (Japanese): ヴァーイミーツヴォーイ
Caption (Japanese):
ゲルドの街で人気のフルーツジュース
飲むと気分が高揚する トロピカルな味

Name: Monster Stew
Caption:
Meat and seafood simmered in monster
extract. A savory dish despite its ingredients.
Caption (Japanese):
肉や魚をマモノエキスで煮込んだキワモノ料理
他の食材には出せない旨味があるらしいが…

Name: Monster Soup
Caption:
Using monster extract as a base, this soup's
distinct gaminess is either loved or hated.
Caption (Japanese):
マモノエキスをベースに作ったスープ
癖がとても強く 好みが分かれる独特な味わい

Name: Monster Curry
Caption:
This unusual take on curry uses monster
extract and doesn't rely only on spices.
Caption (Japanese):
マモノエキスがたっぷり使われた 変り種カレー
辛さだけではない刺激が味わえるらしい

Name: Monster Rice Balls
Caption:
Rice balls flavored with monster extract.
Their unique aroma is not for everyone.
Caption (Japanese):
マモノエキスで味付けされた 斬新なおにぎり
独特の香りがして 食べる人を選ぶ味付け

Name: Monster Cake
Caption:
It's said that once you have a taste of this
cake, you'll never forget its sweetness.
Caption (Japanese):
マモノエキスを使った 独創的なケーキ
一度食べると忘れられない甘味があるという噂

Name: Dark Stew
Caption:
A daring dish of dark clump stewed with
meat and fish. What a surprise!
Caption (Japanese):
肉や魚と一緒に闇の塊を煮込んだ 挑戦的な料理
何の具材が入っているかは 食べてみてのお楽しみ

Name: Dark Soup
Caption:
A gooey soup built on stewed dark clump.
One could get lost in its swirls and flavors.
Caption (Japanese):
闇の塊を煮込んだ どろり濃厚スープ
風味は独特で 見ていると吸い込まれそうになる

Name: Dark Curry
Caption:
A hard-hitting curry with a dark-clump
base, whose flavor is hard to hide.
Caption (Japanese):
闇の塊を材料に使った インパクト満点のカレー
隠しきれない素材の味わいが あふれ出ている

Name: Dark Rice Ball
Caption:
A bold rice ball made with dark clump and
Hylian rice. Its flavor is unforgettable!
Caption (Japanese):
闇の塊とハイラル米で作った 先鋭的なおにぎり
一度食べると忘れられない 深い深い味わい

Name: Dark Cake
Caption:
An unusual dark-clump cake with a unique
flavor that may be impossible to fully describe.
Caption (Japanese):
闇の塊をふんだんに使った 風変わりなケーキ
一言で表現するのは難しい 独特な味

Name: Dubious Food
Caption:
It's too gross to even look at. A bizarre smell
issues forth from this heap. Eating it won't
hurt you though...probably.
Caption (Japanese):
微妙なにおいがする…
食べられなくはないが
とても人には見せられない！

Name: Rock-Hard Food
Caption:
A dish gone awry after adding the wrong
ingredient. Chewing your way through this
won't be fun, but it will fill you up when
you're between a rock and a hard place.
Caption (Japanese):
何か入れてはいけないものを混ぜてしまった
ちょっと人には出せない料理
背に腹は代えられない時には かじるしかない

Name: Baked Apple
Caption:
Direct heat has softened and sweetened
this apple. Eat it to restore three-quarters
of a heart.
Caption (Japanese):
リンゴを直火であぶった香ばしいおやつ
食べるとハートが回復する

Name: Baked Golden Apple
Caption:
A luxurious snack of golden apple roasted
directly over a fire. The impeccable balance
between acidity and sweetness gives it an
otherworldly, delicious flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
金のリンゴを直火であぶった贅沢なおやつ
酸味と甘味が絶妙なバランスとなり
この世の物とは思えない 味わいを楽しめる

Name: Charred Pepper
Caption:
A pepper that's been gently caressed by an
open flame. It's much less spicy now.
Caption (Japanese):
ポカポカ草の実を焼いたもの
火を通す事で辛みがなくなり
そのまま食べても結構おいしい

Name: Roasted Hylian Tomato
Caption:
A Hylian tomato toasted whole.
It's juicy inside and will restore
more health when consumed.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラルトマトの丸焼き
中身はジューシーで
ハートの回復量も増えている

Name: Roasted Wildberry
Caption:
This wildberry was prepared over an open
flame to alter its sweet taste. It recovers
more health than if eaten raw.
Caption (Japanese):
イチゴの直火焼き
そのまま食べるのとは 違った甘味がある
少しだけハートの回復量が増えた

Name: Roasted Voltfruit
Caption:
This voltfruit from the Gerudo Desert has
been charred to really bring out its sweet
and sour flavors.
Name (Japanese): 焼きビリビリフルーツ
Caption (Japanese):
ゲルド砂漠で採れる ビリビリフルーツの直火焼き
生で食べるより 甘みや酸味が強くなった
ちょっと焦げた位がおいしい

Name: Roasted Hydromelon
Caption:
This hydromelon was roasted whole for
a very soft and flaky inner flesh with a
rather intriguing flavor. Now this is your
money melon!
Caption (Japanese):
ヒンヤリメロンの丸焼き
温かくなった果肉は ほくほくした食感
なんとも不思議な味わい

Name: Baked Palm Fruit
Caption:
This palm fruit was broiled with direct heat,
resulting in steamed flesh inside the rind.
Best served at the moment the juices
emerge while roasting.
Caption (Japanese):
ヤシの実を直火であぶったひと品
皮につつまれた果肉が蒸し焼きになっている
残った果汁と一緒に食べるのがおすすめ

Name: Roasted Mighty Bananas
Caption:
These mighty bananas have been roasted
whole. Cooking them through has turned the
fruit inside into a sticky, rich, aromatic syrup.
Caption (Japanese):
ツルギバナナの丸焼き
火が通った事で実がとろとろになって
甘みや香りも豊かになった

Name: Roasted Lotus Seeds
Caption:
Flame-roasted fleet-lotus seeds.
Peel the skin back to get to the soft
and flaky center.
Name (Japanese): 焼きゴーゴーハスの実
Caption (Japanese):
直火で焼いたゴーゴーハスの実
皮をむいて食べれば ほくほくで
栗のような食感が味わえる

Name: Roasted Mighty Thistle
Caption:
Lightly toasted mighty thistle. It has no
special effects, but now that it's been grilled,
the pointy ends go down smooth.
Caption (Japanese):
ツルギソウの素焼き
特別な効果はないが
とんがった花もパリッとしておいしく食べられる

Name: Roasted Armoranth
Caption:
Simple, roasted armoranth. The heat has
frayed the hard, chewy fiber just enough
to make it easy to eat.
Caption (Japanese):
ヨロイソウの丸焼き
硬くて歯ごたえのあった繊維質も 
熱を通した事で ほぐれて食べやすくなった

Name: Roasted Swift Carrot
Caption:
A fragrant swift carrot that's been
lightly roasted. It doesn't have any
special effects, but it will restore
some health.
Name (Japanese): 焼きゴーゴーニンジン
Caption (Japanese):
香ばしいゴーゴーニンジンの丸焼き
特別な効果はないが
ハートを回復する事ができる

Name: Roasted Endura Carrot
Caption:
This flame-kissed endura carrot makes for a
truly extravagant single-item dish. The fire
really brought out its sweetness.
Caption (Japanese):
貴重なガッツニンジンを 
贅沢にそのまま焼いたひと品
火が通って甘味が増している

Name: Baked Fortified Pumpkin
Caption:
This fortified pumpkin has been roasted
whole. The hard rind serves as a container
for the steamed pumpkin flesh inside.
Caption (Japanese):
大きなヨロイカボチャの丸焼き
硬い皮が器の働きをしており
中身が蒸し焼きになっている

Name: Baked Sun Pumpkin
Caption:
A large, whole, roasted sun pumpkin. It lost
its original effect in the baking process, but
it's soft and tasty.
Name (Japanese): 焼きヒダマリカボチャ
Caption (Japanese):
大きなヒダマリカボチャの丸焼き
特別な効果は無くなっているが
蒸し焼きの中身は柔らかくておいしい

Name: Roasted Radish
Caption:
A roasted hearty radish. Fragrant and
warm, it has no special effect but will
restore hearts.
Caption (Japanese):
マックスラディッシュの丸焼き
ホクホクして香ばしい
特殊な効果はないが食べるとハートが回復する

Name: Roasted Big Radish
Caption:
A roasted big hearty radish.
To take such a precious vegetable
and put it to the fire is decadent
in a way.
Caption (Japanese):
大マックスラディッシュの丸焼き
貴重な野菜を思い切って焼いてみた
ある意味贅沢な一品

Name: Toasty Skyshroom
Caption:
A simply grilled skyshroom. The heat brings
out its flavor and increases the amount of
health it can restore.
Caption (Japanese):
ソラダケの素焼き
焼いた事で風味がぐんと増し
ハートの回復量が増えている

Name: Toasty Hylian Shroom
Caption:
A Hylian shroom toasted to perfection.
The taste and fragrance are amplified,
restoring more health to its consumer.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラルダケの素焼き
味も香りも格段によくなって
ハートの回復量も増えた

Name: Toasty Stamella Shroom
Caption:
This toasted stamella shroom doesn't grant
any special effects, but it will restore
a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ガンバリダケの丸焼き
効果はハートの回復だけだが
生で食べるよりはかなりおいしい

Name: Toasty Rushroom
Caption:
A rushroom that's been put to the torch.
It may have lost its speedy properties, but
at least it tastes good now.
Caption (Japanese):
ゴーゴーダケの丸焼き
不思議な力は失われたが味は格段にアップした

Name: Toasty Sunshroom
Caption:
It's always a good idea to keep a fully
roasted sunshroom or two on hand just
in case. Eat it to recover a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ポカポカダケの丸焼き
いざという時のためにポーチにあると安心
ハートを回復する事ができる

Name: Toasty Chillshroom
Caption:
A fully roasted chillshroom. It's evenly
toasted and tastes a lot better than
when eaten raw. Eating it will restore
a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ヒンヤリダケの丸焼き
こんがり焼けて 生で食べるよりおいしくなった
ハートを回復する事ができる

Name: Toasty Zapshroom
Caption:
It's not very shocking that this fully roasted
zapshroom is delicious. Eat it to recover
a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ビリビリダケの丸焼き
ピリッとくる事もなく まろやかな味になった
ハートを回復する事ができる

Name: Toasty Razorshroom
Caption:
A razorshroom that's been exposed to
direct heat. Its sharp exterior has softened
considerably. Restores a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ツルギダケの丸焼き
生のまま食べるよりホクホクしておいしい
ハートが回復する

Name: Toasty Ironshroom
Caption:
An ironshroom exposed to an open
flame. Its once-tough exterior is now crunchy
and tasty. Restores a bit of health.
Caption (Japanese):
ヨロイダケの丸焼き
硬かった表面もカリッとしておいしい
ハートを回復する事ができる

Name: Toasty Silent Shroom
Caption:
A whole, toasted silent shroom. High heat
may have destroyed its soft glow, but it's
now fragrant and tasty.
Caption (Japanese):
シノビダケの丸焼き
優しく光っていた面影はないが
香ばしくておいしい

Name: Toasty Brightcap
Caption:
A whole, roasted brightcap. Sure, it loses its
bioluminescent enzymes, but it's softer and
easier to chew.
Caption (Japanese):
アカリダケの丸焼き
光を放つ酵素は失われてしまったが
柔らかく食べやすくなっている

Name: Toasty Endura Shroom
Caption:
A toasted endura shroom. It doesn't grant
any special effects, but boy is it tasty!
Caption (Japanese):
ガッツダケの丸焼き
特別な効果はないが
おいしさがギュッと凝縮されている

Name: Toasted Hearty Truffle
Caption:
A hearty truffle toasted until its outside is
crispy. It tastes great, but hearty truffles are
far more effective when cooked in a recipe.
Name (Japanese): 焼きマックストリュフ
Caption (Japanese):
マックストリュフをこんがり焼き上げた
とってもおいしいが 料理に使った方が
より大きな効果が期待できる

Name: Toasted Big Hearty Truffle
Caption:
This big hearty truffle has been roasted
whole. It gets full points for aroma and
nutrition. Eat it to recover a lot of hearts.
Name (Japanese): 焼き大マックストリュフ
Caption (Japanese):
貴重な食材である 大マックストリュフの丸焼き
火であぶる事で 香りがより豊かになった
食べるとハートがたくさん回復する

Name: Seared Steak
Caption:
Meat cooked over an open flame. Cooking it
has increased its flavor and the number of
hearts it provides.
Caption (Japanese):
ケモノ肉を直火で焼いたもの
焼く事で香ばしくなり
ハートの回復量も増えた

Name: Seared Prime Steak
Caption:
Prime meat cooked over an open flame.
The outside is perfectly browned, while
the inside is mouthwateringly juicy.
Caption (Japanese):
肉厚な上ケモノ肉の丸焼き
外側は香ばしく 中はジューシーで
たまらなくおいしい

Name: Seared Gourmet Steak
Caption:
The highest quality gourmet meat, just
kissed by an open flame. No additional
seasonings have been added, which lets
the natural flavor of the meat really shine.
Caption (Japanese):
最高級の肉である極上ケモノ肉を 
あえて何も味付けせずに 直火で焼き上げた料理
素材本来の味を 存分に味わう事ができる逸品

Name: Roasted Bird Drumstick
Caption:
Bird drumstick that's been cooked to a crisp,
skin and all. It's devoid of seasoning,
but it has a simple, accessible taste.
Restores more hearts than the raw variety.
Caption (Japanese):
皮ごとパリッと焼き上げたトリ肉
余計な味付けをしない分 シンプルなおいしさ
ハートの回復量も増えた

Name: Roasted Bird Thigh
Caption:
Prime meat that's been flame-seared to
perfection. The outside is crispy, but the
inside is juicy. Eat it to recover hearts.
Caption (Japanese):
貴重な上トリ肉をこんがり焼き上げた
外はパリッと中はジューシーな仕上がり
食べるとハートが回復する

Name: Roasted Whole Bird
Caption:
This whole bird has been tickled by an open
flame to bring out its flavor. Less is more,
as the lack of additional seasoning allows
its natural taste to shine.
Caption (Japanese):
最高級食材である 極上トリ肉の丸焼き
何も味付けしない 野性味あふれる調理方法で
素材本来の味を 十分に楽しむ事ができる逸品

Name: Roasted Arowana
Caption:
A whole, grilled ancient arowana. The meat is
cooked through and has reached a perfect
tenderness.
Caption (Japanese):
ムカシアロワナの丸焼き
引き締まった身に火が通って
ほどよい柔らかさになっている

Name: Roasted Bass
Caption:
A bass that's been cooked whole over an
open flame. It's flaky and savory smelling.
Offers more hearts than the raw version.
Caption (Japanese):
バスの丸焼き 生のままより
こんがり焼くと香ばしくなりおいしく食べられる
ハートの回復量も増えた

Name: Roasted Trout
Caption:
This trout can be found all over Hyrule.
Served river-to-table, it's simply cooked
for a soft and flaky flesh with a mild flavor.
Caption (Japanese):
ハイラル各地で獲れるマスの姿焼き
火を通した身はホクホクしており
あっさりとして優しい味がする

Name: Roasted Carp
Caption:
Roasting this freshwater carp helped to
suppress some of its stench, making it
easier to stomach. You can really sink
your teeth into the thick, meaty flesh.
Caption (Japanese):
淡水で獲れるコイを焼き上げた料理
加熱した事で 魚の臭みも減って食べやすくなった
肉厚の身は食べごたえも十分

Name: Roasted Porgy
Caption:
The soft and fluffy texture of this seafaring
fish has been enhanced by roasting it over
an open fire. The crisp, aromatic skin is
particularly delicious.
Caption (Japanese):
海で育ったタイの丸焼き
白身魚特有の ふんわり柔らかな身と
カリカリで香ばしい皮が味わえる

Name: Roasted Cave Fish
Caption:
A dish of grilled glowing cave fish. The fish's
loose meat is nicely cooked to give it both
excellent flavor and texture.
Caption (Japanese):
アカリホラウオを焼いた料理
元々身が崩れやすい魚だが 焼くと口の中で
ほろほろと身がほぐれて とてもおいしい

Name: Roasted Hearty Bass
Caption:
An open flame has crisped the skin of this
hearty bass to perfection. It's a sizable
portion and contains just the right amount
of fat to create an exceptionally tasty dish.
Caption (Japanese):
貴重なマックスバスの丸焼き
直火であぶった事で 皮がパリッと焼けている
丸々と太った身は脂が乗って おいしさ抜群

Name: Roasted Hearty Salmon
Caption:
A fresh hearty salmon roasted simply over
an open flame without any additional
flavoring. Not only is the skin edible but
it gives off a rather nice aroma as well.
Name (Japanese): 焼きマックスサーモン
Caption (Japanese):
新鮮なマックスサーモンを 味付けせずに
シンプルに直火で焼き上げた ひと品
皮も香ばしくて おいしく食べられる

Name: Blackened Crab
Caption:
A whole crab slow-roasted in its shell. The
soft, flaky flesh pairs nicely with the scent
of the charred shell for a meal that assaults
all five of your senses in all the best ways.
Caption (Japanese):
身の詰まったカニを じっくりとあぶった料理
香ばしく ホクホクした甘い身が絶品
焦げた殻もとても良い香りがする

Name: Sneaky River Escargot
Caption:
Sneaky river snail roasted whole in its shell.
The meat is soft and a little chewy. Pulling all
the meat from the shell in one go fills you
with a sense of accomplishment.
Caption (Japanese):
シノビタニシを貝殻ごと焼き上げた料理
プリプリとした歯ごたえが特徴的
うまく身を取り出せるとちょっと嬉しい

Name: Roasted Tree Nut
Caption:
A tree seed roasted to amplify its fragrance.
Gives more hearts than the raw variety.
Caption (Japanese):
香ばしく焼いた木の実
少しだけハートの回復量が増えた

Name: Roasted Acorn
Caption:
An acorn cooked with direct heat.
Its nutty aroma has been amplified.
Caption (Japanese):
直火で焼いたどんぐり
香ばしく甘みも増す

Name: Campfire Egg
Caption:
Roasting a bird egg whole in its shell like this
helps retain water, making the egg a bit
chewier than usual.
Caption (Japanese):
トリのタマゴをカラごと焼き上げた料理
余分な水分がなくなる事で
茹でるより身がプリプリになる

Name: Hard-Boiled Egg
Caption:
A bird egg boiled using water from naturally
occurring hot springs. It's popular among
children and is easy to make.
Caption (Japanese):
地面から湧き出る温水の熱で
茹でられたトリのタマゴ
手軽に作れる 子供にも人気のひと品

Name: Icy Meat
Caption:
A frozen slab of animal meat. If you can
manage to chew it up and swallow it, you'll
restore some hearts and lower your body
temperature.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたケモノ肉
かじりつくにはちょっと硬すぎる
少しだけハート回復と耐暑効果を得られる

Name: Icy Prime Meat
Caption:
High-quality, frozen animal meat. Doesn't
restore many hearts, but it can lower your
body temperature.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついた上ケモノ肉
少しだけハート回復と耐暑効果を得られる

Name: Icy Gourmet Meat
Caption:
This raw gourmet meat has been frozen for
easy traveling. It's kept its flavor through the
freezing process. Eating it as is will provide
a temporary boost to your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついた極上ケモノ肉
上質な肉は凍らせても 味が落ちにくいという
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Bird Drumstick
Caption:
It's as hard as a rock but is supposedly
edible. It restores a small number of hearts
and has a cooling effect.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたトリ肉
こん棒みたいだけど一応食べられる
少しだけハート回復と耐暑効果を得られる

Name: Frozen Bird Thigh
Caption:
High-quality, frozen bird meat. It's so solid it
looks like it could be used as a weapon.
Eating it will restore some hearts and cool
you down, but don't break your teeth on it.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついた上トリ肉
武器にできそうなくらい硬い
少しだけハート回復と耐暑効果を得られる

Name: Frozen Whole Bird
Caption:
This raw whole bird may have been
frozen solid, but its flavor remains intact.
Eating it will provide a temporary boost
to your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついた極上トリ肉
カチカチで硬いが 味は落ちていない
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Arowana
Caption:
Being frozen has condensed the taste
of fish inside this arowana's body. Eating it
will provide a temporary boost to your
heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたアロワナ
引き締まった身に 旨味が凝縮されている
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Bass
Caption:
That's one cold fish. Eating it won't restore
many hearts, but it will lower your body
temperature a bit.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたバス
食べてもハートはあまり回復しないが
少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Trout
Caption:
Being frozen has condensed the taste
of fish inside this trout's body. Eating it
will provide a temporary boost to your
heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたマス
身が締まって 旨味も凝縮されている
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Carp
Caption:
The crunchy, icy texture of this chilled
carp is quite the delicacy. Eating it will
temporarily increase your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたコイ
シャリシャリした食感が新しい
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Porgy
Caption:
This frozen porgy is the ideal snack for hiking
through hot climates like the Gerudo Desert.
Eating it provides a temporary boost to your
heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたタイ
ゲルド砂漠などの 暑い地域で食べたい一品
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Cave Fish
Caption:
A frozen glowing cave fish is just easier to
eat than an unfrozen one. And, once eaten, it
makes heat more bearable for a short time.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたアカリホラウオ 普段だと
崩れやすい身が 引き締まって食べやすい
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Hearty Bass
Caption:
This hearty bass has been frozen by cold air.
Eating it will be a challenge because it's
frozen solid, but if you persevere, it will
temporarily increase your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたマックスバス
かなり硬くて食べづらいが このまま食べる事で
少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Hearty Salmon
Caption:
This salmon doesn't taste quite as fishy
because the excess fat has been removed.
It's exceptionally cold, so eating it provides
a temporary boost to heat resistance.
Name (Japanese): 凍結マックスサーモン
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたマックスサーモン
余分な脂が抜け 風味が増すと言われている
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen Crab
Caption:
Doesn't provide as much companionship as
an unfrozen crab, but it won't spoil during
your travels. Eat it to gain a temporary boost
to your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたカニ
本来は保存のために凍らせているが このまま
食べる事もでき 少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Frozen River Snail
Caption:
The distinct glow of this sneaky river snail
has diminished after it's been frozen, but
eating it like this will provide a temporary
increase to your heat resistance.
Caption (Japanese):
冷気で凍りついたシノビタニシ
特徴的な光も 凍らせると出なくなる
食べると少しの間 耐暑効果を発揮する

Name: Energizing Elixir
Caption:
Restores your stamina, which is used when
performing physical actions such as 
climbing walls or swimming.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Restores your stamina, which is used when
performing physical actions such as 
climbing walls or swimming.
Caption (Japanese):
がんばりゲージを回復させる効果
崖登り中や泳いでいるときでも
減ったがんばりを回復できるとても便利な薬

Name: Hasty Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level haste effect, which
boosts your movement speed while
running, swimming, or climbing.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel haste effect, which
boosts your movement speed while
running, swimming, or climbing.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level haste effect, which
boosts your movement speed while
running, swimming, or climbing.
Caption (Japanese):
速く動ける ゴーゴー効果 Lv1
運動神経がすごく良くなる薬
走って登って泳いで すべての動きが速くなる

Name: Spicy Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level warming effect, increasing
your resistance to cold environments. Very
useful when exploring snow-covered
mountains.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a high-level warming effect,
increasing your resistance to cold
environments. Very useful when exploring
snow-covered mountains.
Caption (Japanese):
厳しい寒さに耐えられる 耐寒効果 Lv2
体の芯からポカポカしてくる薬
雪山ではとても頼りになる

Name: Chilly Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level cooling effect, raising
your body's resistance to heat. Crucial for
long journeys through the desert.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a high-level cooling effect, raising
your body's resistance to heat. Crucial for
long journeys through the desert.
Caption (Japanese):
厳しい暑さに耐えられる 耐暑効果 Lv1
身体を冷やし 熱を外に逃がす事ができる薬
砂漠の旅には欠かせない

Name: Electro Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level resistance to electricity.
Useful against enemies with electrical
attacks.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel resistance to electricity.
Useful against enemies with electrical
attacks.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level resistance to electricity.
Useful against enemies with electrical
attacks.
Caption (Japanese):
電気のしびれに強くなる 耐電効果 Lv1
絶縁効果のある成分を調合した薬
電撃を使う敵との戦いに活躍する

Name: Fireproof Elixir
Caption:
Grants a fireproof effect, which prevents your
body from catching fire.
Be sure to pack this when venturing out
to explore caves in Death Mountain.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a high-level fireproof effect, which
prevents your body from catching fire.
Be sure to pack this when venturing out
to explore caves in Death Mountain.
Caption (Japanese):
灼熱の環境でも体が燃えない 耐火効果 Lv1
高い耐燃性を持つ素材を原料にしている
デスマウンテンの洞窟に挑む時には 持参したい薬

Name: Mighty Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level might effect, which
strengthens your body and mind to boost
your attack power with all weapons.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel might effect, which
strengthens your body and mind to boost
your attack power with all weapons.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level might effect, which
strengthens your body and mind to boost
your attack power with all weapons.
Caption (Japanese):
攻撃が強くなる チカラ効果 Lv1
使うと全身に力がみなぎり
武器を使った攻撃力が増加する

Name: Tough Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level toughness effect, which
fortifies your bones to strengthen your
defense. Best to use before facing off
against hard-hitting enemies.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel toughness effect, which
fortifies your bones to strengthen your
defense. Best to use before facing off
against hard-hitting enemies.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level toughness effect, which
fortifies your bones to strengthen your
defense. Best to use before facing off
against hard-hitting enemies.
Caption (Japanese):
叩かれても耐えられる カチコチ効果 Lv1
骨や体幹が強化され 防御力が増す薬
強敵と戦う前には 準備しておきたい

Name: Sneaky Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level stealth effect, which
calms the nerves and silences footfalls.
Allows you to move about undetected by
monsters and animals.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel stealth effect, which
calms the nerves and silences footfalls.
Allows you to move about undetected by
monsters and animals.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level stealth effect, which
calms the nerves and silences footfalls.
Allows you to move about undetected by
monsters and animals.
Caption (Japanese):
近づいても気づかれない しのび効果 Lv1
気持ちを落ち着かせる静けさ成分を含んだ薬
飲むと動物やマモノに気づかれにくくなる

Name: Sticky Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level slip resistance to keep you
from slipping on wet surfaces. Its highly
absorptive ingredients make it a must-have
for sudden rainfalls.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel slip resistance to keep you
from slipping on wet surfaces. Its highly
absorptive ingredients make it a must-have
for sudden rainfalls.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level slip resistance to keep
you from slipping on wet surfaces. Its highly
absorptive ingredients make it a must-have
for sudden rainfalls.
Caption (Japanese):
濡れた壁面でも滑りにくくなる 滑り止め効果 Lv1
高い吸着性を持つ素材を原料にしている
急な雨に備えて 準備しておきたい

Name: Bright Elixir
Caption:
Grants a low-level glow effect, illuminating
your immediate surroundings. This faint
luminescence is a boon in dark places.
Caption (Elixir Level 2):
Grants a midlevel glow effect, illuminating
your immediate surroundings. This faint
luminescence is a boon in dark places.
Caption (Elixir Level 3):
Grants a high-level glow effect, illuminating
your immediate surroundings. This faint
luminescence is a boon in dark places.
Caption (Japanese):
狭い範囲を照らす 発光効果 Lv1
自身がほのかに発光して 周囲を照らす
暗闇で持っていると 心強い

Name: Enduring Elixir
Caption:
Restores stamina and temporarily extends
your Stamina Wheel. The additional stamina
will disappear as it's used.
Caption (Japanese):
がんばりゲージの上限を増やす効果
減ったがんばりゲージを回復する効果もあるが
増えた分は使うとなくなる

Name: Hearty Elixir
Caption:
Restores you to full health and increases
your maximum hearts. The additional hearts
are lost as you take damage.
Caption (Japanese):
限界を超えてハートが回復する効果
減ったハートを回復する効果もあるが
ダメージを受けると増えた分はなくなる

Name: Fairy Tonic
Caption:
This powerful recovery elixir harnesses the
power of fairies. It has a sweet fragrance.
Caption (Japanese):
妖精の不思議な力が詰まった 強力な回復薬
ふんわりと甘い香りがする
